accounts.name: manager
docs: The current market manager; only the manager may rotate roles.

accounts.name: manager
docs: The current market manager; only the manager may rotate roles.

accounts.name: authority_signer
docs: Must be the market manager (checked in the handler).

errors.name: GovernanceTimelockNotReady
errors.msg: Market governance timelock is not ready

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Output amount below minimum requested (slippage exceeded)

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: User balance insufficient to cover requested amount

errors.name: OutputAmountOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow during output amount calculation.

errors.name: CashReserveUnderflow
errors.msg: Math underflow during cash reserve calculation.

errors.name: LiquiditySqrtOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow during liquidity square root calculation

errors.name: DebtShareMathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow during debt share calculation

errors.name: DebtShareDivisionOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow during debt share division

errors.name: DebtUtilizationOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow during debt utilization calculation

errors.name: InvalidDistribution
errors.msg: Invalid distribution - percentages must sum to 100%

errors.name: StaleAuctionReference
errors.msg: Protocol auction reference price is stale

errors.name: InvalidVaultSameAccount
errors.msg: Invalid vault - token_in_vault and token_out_vault must be different

errors.name: InvalidParamsHash
errors.msg: Invalid params hash - hash does not match computed parameters

errors.name: InvalidRateModel
errors.msg: Invalid rate model - rate_model does not match market configuration

errors.name: InvalidPositionMarket
errors.msg: Invalid position market - position does not match market

errors.name: InvalidUtilBounds
errors.msg: Invalid utilization bounds - must satisfy: MIN <= start < end <= MAX

errors.name: InvalidRateParams
errors.msg: Invalid rate parameters - check half_life_ms, min_rate_bps, max_rate_bps, initial_rate_bps bounds

errors.name: ReduceOnlyMode
errors.msg: Operation blocked: reduce-only mode is active

errors.name: ReduceOnlyHasDebt
errors.msg: Cannot remove collateral in reduce-only mode while debt exists

errors.name: LiquidityDeltaCircuitBreaker
errors.msg: Operation blocked: same-transaction liquidity delta detected

errors.name: LiquidityDeltaCircuitBreakerCpi
errors.msg: Operation blocked: liquidity delta instruction must be top-level

errors.name: InvalidRecipient
errors.msg: Invalid recipient - address does not match configured revenue recipient

errors.name: InsufficientMarketShareBacking
errors.msg: Market reserve share backing is insufficient

errors.name: LiquidationSocializationExceeded
errors.msg: Socialized liquidation loss exceeds caller cap

errors.name: InvalidClaimMint
errors.msg: Claim mint must not charge transfer fees

errors.name: UnbackedFeeLiability
errors.msg: Fee liability is not backed by fee vault balance

errors.name: InstructionNotLive
errors.msg: Instruction is intentionally not live yet

errors.name: LiquidationRepayTooLarge
errors.msg: Liquidation repay amount exceeds partial liquidation cap

errors.name: LeverageInitialMarginTooLow
errors.msg: Leverage position does not have enough initial margin

fields.name: fixed_base_principal
docs: accrued interest) backing fixed margin debt on each side. Accrued
interest is `fixed_*_debt - fixed_*_principal`; tracked so interest can
be routed to the interest vault (non-compounding) instead of

fields.name: isolated_base_shares
docs: Aggregate isolated leverage debt. This debt contributes to utilization
and interest, but is intentionally not recognized as normal margin debt.

fields.name: base_hlp_live_reserve
docs: hLP-owned live reserve depth that is not backed by reserve cash or
normal cash-backed debt. This is the explicit synthetic live component

fields.name: debt_shares
docs: Funding debt used by the hLP vault. It accrues interest and counts
toward utilization, but is not same-side cash-backed reserve debt.

types.name: RevenueRecipients
docs: Revenue recipient wallet addresses. Recipient token accounts are derived or
validated against these owners when protocol fees are claimed.

constants.name: NAD
docs: NAD: Nine-decimal fixed point unit (1e9 scaling), similar to WAD (1e18) by Maker.
